name: Double Strike
description: Two rapid melee attacks which strike all enemies in front of the abomination.
alttext: Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness for each hit of Double Strike.

name: Eternal Arrow
description:
The abomination's archer shoots an arrow that seeks the heart of a nearby target, passing harmlessly through other enemies. Whenever it hits its target it has a chance to continue through it and {Recurve} to strike it again. 

Subsequent {Recurve} chance is multiplied by 0.8 each time the arrow {Recurves}. If the target dies, it will choose a new target.
alttext:
Base recurve chance is 100%.

Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Melee Attack
description: Attacks enemies in an area in front of the abomination.
alttext: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

name: Stomp
description: The abomination stomps the ground, dealing physical damage to enemies in the area.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 300% effectiveness.

name: Abyssal Echoes
description: A nova that echoes from up to 8 enemies it reaches and applies abyssal decay. Enemies with abyssal decay take void damage over time for 5 seconds, if they take a hit all the damage from abyssal decay is dealt to them immediately.
alttext:
Abyssal decay deals a total of 100 void damage over its duration, with added spell damage applied at 100% effectiveness each second.

Abyssal Echoes cannot apply other on hit effects on hit.

name: Abyssal Orb
description:
An orb of pure void energy that seeks out your enemies, dealing a large amount of void damage to the target and a smaller amount in an area around them.

Added spell damage applies to the primary hit at 200% effectiveness and at 100% to the area of effect.

name: Acid Flask
description: Throw a flask of acid that explodes dealing physical damage on impact, poisoning enemies and reducing their armor.
alttext: Added damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Evade
description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

name: Alluvion Wave
description: A wave of crashing water dealing spell cold damage in a wide area. Added spell damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

name: Burning Amber
description:
Enemies outside the Amber's light deal much more damage and take much less damage.

Activate this ability to move the Amber to a target location or recall it.

While your burning Amber is attached to you, it loses illumination when you are hit, reducing the radius at which it illuminates enemies. The illumination lost depends on the damage dealt as a percentage of your maximum health.

Illumination can be restored by slaying an Amber Elemental.
lore: <#C686FF>Burning Amber</color> ability gained while inside The Lightless Arbor

name: Oblivion Wave
description:
A devastating wave of void centred on the caster.

Added spell damage is applied at 500% effectiveness.

Applies three stacks of slow to the caster.
Combo skill that first sends enemies forward in time by 5 seconds. Reactivate the skill to bring those enemies back to your timeline early.
alttext: Bosses are only sent forward by a millisecond, causing return effects to occur immediately without them visually disappearing.
name: Anomaly

description: Brings enemies that were sent forward back to your time.
name: Anomaly
Arcane Ascendance
description: Toggle to prevent movement and drain 25 mana each second. Mana drain increases by 1 mana per second. All spells cost +5 mana to cast. 100% increased spell damage and 50% increased cast speed. Also deals lightning damage over time to surrounding enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 45% effectiveness.

description: Toggle to prevent movement and drain 25 mana each second. Mana drain increases by 1 mana per second. All spells cost +5 mana to cast. 100% increased spell damage and 50% increased cast speed.
name: Arcane Ascendance
Arcane Lightning
description: Hurl a bolt of lightning at the target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Assemble Abomination
description:
Hold ability key to channel to absorb your Wraiths, Summoned Skeletons, Skeletal Mages, Golems, and Volatile Zombies in an area. When you release, summon a single hulking abomination with added health and more damage per minion absorbed.

The abomination remembers the minions absorbed to create it and will rapidly devour those minions to restore 10% of its maximum health.
alttext:
Abomination gains health equal to the max health of minions consumed and 5% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per minion consumed (up to 20 minions).
All minions of the same type are devoured if any one of them are absorbed. For example, Skeleton Warriors, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Archers are the same type of Summoned Skeleton.

name: Aura Of Decay
alttext: Your chance to poison on hit does not increase the rate at which poison is applied to you.
description:
Toggles Aura of Decay, which poisons you every second, and leaves a trail of decay. Enemies near you or in the trail are poisoned four times a second, and your chance to poison on hit applies to each of these instances at 100% effectiveness.

While Aura of Decay is active you take 30% less poison damage. Additionally, you take 50% less damage from your own Aura of Decay.

name: Aura Of Rot
description: An aura surrounding the abomination which poisons it every second. Enemies near it are poisoned four times a second, and the abomination's chance to poison on hit applies to each of these instances at 25% effectiveness.

name: Avalanche
description: Summon the might of winter and pummel your foes in ice and snow, unleashing a large boulder at the target followed by 10 smaller boulders around the area over 2 seconds.
alttext:
Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness. Each hit has a freeze rate of 80.
The large boulder deals 100% more damage and has 100% more area of effect (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

Increased Area for Area Skills stats apply to the area of the individual boulders, but not to the area in which they fall.

name: Fissure
description: Open a fissure underneath your enemies, dealing physical damage over time for 4 seconds.
alttext: Added spell damage is applied at 200% effectiveness per second.

name: Avalanche
description: Launches an icy boulder from the sky.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 300% effectiveness.

name: Axe Throw
description: Throws an axe at a nearby enemy.
alttext:
This is a throwing attack that scales with throwing attack damage and throwing attack speed. It is not a melee attack or spell.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Void Beam
description: A void beam that deals spell damage over time.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 300% effectiveness each second.

description:
Trigger explosive devices, damaging enemies in a small area.

Your Ballista's added bow damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.
name: Explosives
Attack
description: A basic attack with your weapon that costs no mana

name: Attack
description: A basic attack with your weapon that costs no mana

name: Bear Roar
description:
The companion ability of your Primal Bear.

Releases a mighty roar, taunting enemies around it and healing it for 25% of its maximum health.
alttext: The healing scales with your bear's increased healing effectiveness. The area scales your bear's increased area for area skills stats.

name: Thorn Burst
description: Releases a burst of thorns, damaging all nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Black Hole
description: Summon a powerful black hole at target location that aggressively pulls enemies and deals cold damage over time to enemies within its reach.
alttext: Added spell damage is applied at 600% effectiveness per second. The Black Hole persists for 2.75s by default.

name: Bladestorm
description: The thrown blade spins in midair, hitting nearby enemies 3 times per second for 4 seconds.
alttext: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness to each hit. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

name: Blizzard
description: Repeatedly strikes around a target area with hail, wind and frozen objects.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Blood Pool
description: Leave a pool for blood for 3 seconds that slows enemies.

name: Blood Splatter
description:
Blood Splatter is a physical spell dealing damage to other enemies around the target, but not the original target. 

Added damage applies at 50% effectiveness.

name: Blood Tether
description:
Tethers an enemy, drawing blood from them to deal physical damage over time. Deals 1% more damage per bleed on the target.

3% of damage dealt is leeched as health.
alttext:
An enemy cannot have more than one tether at a time. Tethers last 3 seconds.

Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness per second.

name: Sanguine Orb
description:
Launches an orb of blood that hits up to 3 nearby enemies 6 times over 2 seconds.

Added spell damage applies at 150% to each hit.

name: Freezing Grasp
description: Creates a nova around the caster that deals cold damage and has a freeze rate of 200.
alttext: Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Bone Armor
description: A protective coating of bone armor which grants 8% less damage taken for 4 seconds.

name: Bone Curse
description: Apply a curse to enemies in an area for 8 seconds that causes physical damage when hit. The damage is tripled if you inflicted the hit yourself.
alttext:
Added spell damage applies at 20% effectiveness to each hit.

When the curse deals damage it counts as an additional hit, but cannot apply ailments from effects such as "chance to ignite on hit".

name: Bone Eruption
description: Bones erupt from the ground, dealing physical damage to enemies in the area.

name: Bone Nova
description: Bones fly out in all directions, impaling enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Bone Splinters
description: Launch splintered bones that impale enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Bone Shatter
description: Bones fly out in all directions, impaling enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Flurry
description: A bow or melee attack that performs 3 rapid strikes. The last strike can be cancelled by moving.
alttext: Added damage applies at 80% effectiveness to each strike and each strike has a 40% reduced chance to apply ailments on hit.

description: An extended melee stab or piercing bow attack that has a 30% chance to inflict bleed on hit. Bleed inflicted by puncture has 30% increased duration.
name: Puncture
alttext:
When using a bow, Puncture deals 5% less damage to each subsequent enemy hit up to 20% less damage.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Burning Dagger
description: Launch a burning dagger at a nearby enemy.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

name: Burning Dagger Cone
description: Launch a cone of burning daggers at nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

description: A Burning patch on the ground which ignites all enemies twice per second.
name: Burning Patch
Flame Burst
description: A burst of flame that deals high damage in an area around the target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.

name: Freezing Cascade
description: Creates a cascade of freezing novas. Whenever an enemy is hit by a nova another one is created around them. Each ice nova has a freeze rate of 40.
alttext:
Added damage applies at 120% effectiveness.
Each enemy can only be hit by a maximum of one freezing nova.

name: Chakram
description: Throw a single Chakram that pierces through all enemies, rebounds off terrain, and returns to you. Enemies can be hit a second time when the Chakram is returning.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Charged Ground
description:
Charges an area of ground, causing repeated bursts of lightning in smaller areas within it.

Static Orb's damage and area bonuses based on distance travelled also apply to the Charged Ground.
alttext: 150% of added damage applied per second.

name: Cinder Strike
description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
alttext:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

name: Cinder Strike
description: Melee or bow combo with three attacks. The first attack also creates a fiery explosion, damaging nearby enemies.
alttext:
The consecutive attack counter resets if you go 2 seconds without using Cinder Strike.

Added damage applies to the first attack at 200% effectiveness, and to the other attacks at 100% effectiveness.

alttext:

name: Coagulated Blood
description:
Combine the excess coagulated blood into an orb that seeks out the nearest enemy and explodes, hitting all nearby enemies.
Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

name: Consecrated Ground
description:
Allies on the consecrated ground are healed for 50 health each second.

Enemies on Consecrate Ground take fire damage over time that scales with spell damage. Consecrate Ground gains 1 Spell Damage per 5% increased healing effectiveness.

Added spell damage applies at 375% effectiveness per second.

name: Create Shadow
description:
Create a Shadow of yourself that persists for up to 5 seconds and will imitate your next Shadow Cascade, Shurikens, Umbral Blades, or Acid Flask.
Up to 3 Shadows can be active at once.

name: Dancing Strikes
description:
Requires dual wielding.

A series of fast dash attacks. Dancing Strikes' movement does not scale with attack speed, but it gains increased cooldown recovery speed and more damage equal to 50% of your total increased melee attack speed.
alttext:
Added damage is applied to each attack at 150% effectiveness.

Your total increased melee attack speed includes the modifier from attack rate and generic increased attack speed stats. If your {Melee Attack Speed} is 1.5, then Dancing Strikes gains 25% increased cooldown recovery speed and 25% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

name: Dancing Strikes

name: Iron Blade
description: Launches a blade towards an enemy, dealing melee physical damage.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Dark Quiver
description:
Requires a bow.

Summons 7 Black Arrows that rain from the sky over 4 seconds, granting 100% increased damage to your next bow attack when retrieved.
alttext: You can hold up to 3 Black Arrows at once, but can only expend one at a time.

name: Death Seal
description:
Toggle to seal your health, preventing it from going above its current value for 3 seconds. While sealed you take less damage equal to half your percent missing health, and 90% of hit damage taken is dealt over 4 seconds. 

Reactivate to unleash a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been active and your current percent missing health.
alttext:
The Wave of Death deals up to 20% more damage per second Death Seal has been active and deal 1% more damage per 1% missing health. Both effects are multiplicative with other modifiers.

Added spell damage applies at 500% effectiveness to Wave of Death.

Hit damage that is dealt over 4 seconds cannot be altered after the hit and is unaffected by temporary immunity effects. It does not count as damage over time.

name: Death Seal
description: Releases a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been actve and your current percent missing health.

name: Wave of Death
description: Releases a Wave of Death dealing damage based on how long Death Seal has been actve and your current percent missing health.
alttext: Added damage applies at 500% effectiveness.

name: Decoy
description: Throw a device to create a Decoy that taunts enemies around it for 2.5 seconds before exploding.
alttext:
Added throwing attack damage is applied at 600% effectiveness to the explosion.

The Decoy cannot be destroyed before it expires.

name: Explosives
description: Trigger small hidden explosives hidden in your Decoy, damaging enemies near it.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.

name: Sonic Wave
description: Your Decoy emits a piercing sound that afflicts enemies around it with armor shred and frailty.

name: Defiling Nova
description:
A wave of defilement erupts from you, hitting enemies in an expanding area dealing spell physical damage on hit. 

Your poison chance applies at 500% of its normal value to the wave's hits.

name: Detonate Decoy
description: Detonate your decoys instantly.

name: Detonate Ground
description: After a short delay the ground erupts in a firey explosion.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.

name: Detonating Arrow
description:
Requires a bow.

Fires an arrow that embeds itself in a target then explodes after 0.6 seconds.
alttext: Added bow damage applies to the arrow at 125% effectiveness and to the explosion at 200% effectiveness.

name: Lightning Tendrils
description: A bolt of lightning created by the detonation, jumping to nearby enemies.

name: Devouring Orb
description:
Creates a devouring orb at the target location for 10 seconds that deals void damage over time to nearby enemies, and casts a void rift whenever something dies nearby, hitting nearby enemies to deal void damage.

Each successive rift has 12% more damage and area of effect, capped at an increase of 120%.
alttext:
Added damage is applied to the damage over time area at 100% effectiveness per second, and to the Void Rifts at 75% effectiveness.

Devouring orb cannot cast more than one void rift every 0.1 seconds.

name: Devouring Souls
description:
Calls forth five hungering souls that seeks out enemies, on hit they deal necrotic damage and then possesses the target.

Possessed enemies take necrotic damage over time for 1.5 seconds. Enemies cannot be possessed by multiple souls at once.
alttext:
Possess's damage counts as spell damage and it is affected by modifiers to base spell damage.

Added spell damage applies to the initial hit at 200% and to possess at 100% per second for 1.5 seconds.

name: Disintegrate
description: Channel to create a beam of pure energy in the target direction. The beam deals fire and lightning damage to all enemies caught in it.
alttext: Added damage applies at 480% effectiveness each second. Damage reduces while rotating.

name: Divine Bolt
description: Cast a bolt of divine fire towards the target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Divine Flare
description: A holy blast which deals spell fire damage to nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage applies at 350% effectiveness.

name: Doom Pulse
description: Unleashes a wave of void energy in the target direction. Added spell damage is applied at at 500% effectiveness.

name: Doom Brand
description: A brand that persists on its target indefinitely. When the target dies, the Doom Brand erupts, dealing necrotic damage in an area around it.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

name: Dragonfire
description: A burst of firey breath that deals damage to enemies in a cone in the direction you're facing. Added spell damage applies at 900% effectiveness.

name: Dragonflame Nova
description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. This ability is cast by your minion, not by you.
alttext: Added damage applies at 400% effectiveness.

name: Stygian Beam
description: Shoot a quick necrotic beam at the target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Drain Life
alttext: Added spell damage applies at 360% effectiveness per second.
description: Channelled spell that targets up to 3 enemies around the target location, dealing necrotic damage over time and leeching 30% of that damage back as health.

name: Dread Shade
description: Your minion's health is drained for 3% of its max health per second for each second the shade has been active, but it and your minions around it deal +10 necrotic damage with spells and attacks and have 50% increased necrotic damage.
alttext:
Each minion only benefits from one Dread Shade aura. Max 4 active shades.

Your maximum number of shades is shared with Infernal Shade.

name: Earthquake
description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area around you sending out tremors to nearby enemies.

name: Aftershock
description: Seeks out targets and erupts, damaging all nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness

name: Earthquake
description: Slam the ground with your weapon damaging enemies in a large area and creating 2 to 4 aftershocks nearby.
alttext: Added melee damage applies at 700% effectiveness.

name: Elemental Nova
description:
Casts a nova around you that deals fire, cold and lightning damage.

All types of Elemental Nova that you have enabled have an equal chance to be cast.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 120% effectiveness.

name: Enchant Weapon
description:
Active: Enchant your weapon with elemental power. Your melee attacks deal 50% more elemental damage for 5 seconds.

Passive: Your melee attacks deal 15% more elemental damage.
alttext: Multiplicative with other damage modifiers

name: Fire Burst
description: An explosion that deals fire damage in an area.
alttext: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Energy Wave
description: Release a small wave of spell physical energy that has a set distance and travels through enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

name: Ensnaring Roots
description:
Call forth a wave of roots that grows outwards in a wide cone in front of you. The wave deals physical damage and roots enemies it hits for 1.5 seconds. Rooted enemies take physical damage over time until they are freed.


Added spell damage applies at 100% to the initial hit and 200% per second to the damage over time.
alttext: Added spell damage applies to the damage over time at 200% effectiveness per second.

name: Entangling Roots
description:
Call forth a wave of roots that grows outwards in a wide cone in front of you. The wave deals physical damage and roots enemies it hits for 1.5 seconds. Rooted enemies take physical damage over time until they are freed.


Added spell damage applies at 100% to the initial hit and 200% per second to the damage over time.

name: Erasing Strike
description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in a large area in front of you. Enemies killed by the hit are erased from existence, replaced by void rifts.
alttext: Added melee damage has 600% effectiveness on the initial hit, but none on the void rifts, which are void spells.

name: Eterra's Blessing
description: The nearest allied target is healed for 100 health. If the target is one of your minions then the healing is tripled and the minion is energised for 4 seconds, increasing its size by 20% and its damage by 100%.

name: Volatile Flask
description: Throw a highly explosive flask at a target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Falconry
description:
Passive:
Summons a {Falcon} that fights with you.

Active:
{Falcon Strikes}: The {Falcon} rapidly hits many enemies in the target area.
lore: The Dune Falcon is one of the most deadly hunters in all of Eterra. What it lacks in size it makes up in speed, precision, and intelligence. Fierce and independent, the Dune Falcon is known to maim those who attempt to train it. Only those it recognizes as an equal can hope to gain its trust and be accepted as a hunting partner.
alttext: The Falcon cannot take damage and is untargetable by enemies. Press {A} to give your minions an attack command.

name: Feather Knives
description:
Your {Falcon} throws out several sharp feathers at nearby enemies dealing physical damage and scales with the Falcon's throwing damage.

This effect has a 10 second cooldown.
alttext: Added damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

name: Caltrops
description:
Creates an area of sharp {Caltrops} that deals physical damage when enemies first walk over them.

Enemies can only take damage once per {Caltrops} area, but stacking multiple on top of each other will still cause enemies to take damage from each of the areas.
alttext: Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Falcon Strikes
description: Your Falcon rapidly strike enemies within the target area.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

name: Aerial Assault
description: You leap towards the target and your {Falcon} dives to catch you and momentarily carry you further, before it flies up and unleashes a {Wing Burst} at the target location.
alttext: The Wing Burst deals physical throwing damage and scales with your Falcon's stats.

name: Wing Burst
description: After Aerial Assault your {Falcon} releases a quick burst of sharp feathers from its wings at nearby enemies dealing physical damage that scales with the Falcon's throwing damage.
alttext: Added throwing damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Featherstorm
description: A torrent of sharp feathers that rain down over enemies dealing physical damage over time and scales with the Falcon's throwing damage.
alttext: Added damage applies at 250% effectiveness each second.

name: Dive Bomb
description: Your {Falcon} ascends high into the sky then dive bombs the target location at high speed, dealing a high amount of physical damage to enemies in the area.
alttext:
Your falcon's added damage applies at 500% effectiveness.
If Dive Bomb is interrupted before impact, 70% of the cooldown and mana cost are recovered.

name: Featherfall
description: Razorsharp feathers fall from the sky striking enemies in a wide area around the target location dealing physical damage and scales with the {Falcon's} throwing damage.
alttext: Added damage applies at 400% effectiveness.

name: Explosive Trap
alttext: Added damage applies at 300% effectiveness to the explosion.
description:
Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing throwing fire damage. Traps take 0.4 seconds to arm and explode when enemies walk over them or after 30s. 

You can have a maximum of 6 active traps at a time.

name: Net
description: Leaps backwards and throws a net which snares enemies and deals physical damage. Netted bosses and rare enemies have 35% less movement speed, and other enemies are immobilized.
alttext:
Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.
Nets last 3-5 seconds at random on each enemy.

Added throwing attack damage is applied at 600% effectiveness to the explosion.

The Decoy cannot be destroyed before it expires.
description:
Throws a trap that releases a net at a nearby enemy when it triggers.

You can have a maximum of 6 Net Traps active at once and they last up to 30 seconds.
name: Net Trap
Terrify
description:
Inflicts Fear for 1.5 to 2.7 seconds, causing enemies to flee from the target location. Enemies can only be feared once.

Effects that trigger when you use Evade also trigger when you use Terrify.

name: Fissure
description: Open a fissure underneath your enemies, dealing spell fire damage over time for 3 seconds.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness each second.

name: Wall of Fire
description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Collapsing Decay
description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

name: Fire Aura
description: Deals fire damage in an area around you. Can be converted to cold or lightning.
alttext: Added spell damage is applied at 140% effectiveness per second.

name: Fire Burst
description: An explosion that deals fire damage in an area.
alttext: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Fire Nova
description: Casts a nova around you that deals fire damage.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 130% effectiveness.

name: Magma Shards
description: Shards of magma splinter off, hitting enemies around you. Added spell damage applies at 300% effectiveness.

name: Fire Trail
description: Leaves a wake of fire behind you that ignites enemies and lasts for 3 seconds.

name: Fireball
description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 40% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Flame Burst
description: A burst of flame that deals high damage in an area around the target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 500% effectiveness.

name: Firebrand
description: A melee attack which grants you a stack of Firebrand buff if it hits an enemy. Each stack of the Firebrand buff increases the size of subsequent Firebrand attacks and adds melee fire damage.
alttext:
Firebrand can stack up to 4 times. Each stack grants +5 melee fire damage, increases the size of Firebrand attacks by 25% and lasts for 4 seconds.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Flame Whip
description: A fire whip that lashes at a nearby enemy.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 300% effectiveness.

name: Flame Reave
description:
A melee attack that release a wave of flames from your weapon cleaving through enemies in a cone infront of you. Deals up to 50% less damage to distant enemies. 

Deals 16 additional base fire damage. Other added melee damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Holy Trail
description:
Creates a trail of holy fire and lightning which damages enemies standing on it.

Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness per second.

name: Flame Ward
description: Grants a burst of 400 ward. Then for 3 seconds, hits deal 30% less damage to you and cause a retaliatory burst of flames.
alttext:
Added spell damage applies ot the burst of flames at 200% effectiveness.

The area of effect of the burst of flames scales with increased Area of Area Skills stats.

name: Flame Wave
description: Launch a wave of flame toward the target, hitting all enemies in its path.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.

name: Flay
description:
Spirit Step up to 3 meters towards an enemy if not within range, then perform a narrow rending slash.
Each enemy killed by the melee attack will release a Blood Eruption, a spell dealing physical damage in an area.

description: An invocation inspired by ancient two headed drakes. Deals fire and cold damage to all enemies in a cone in front of you. Added spell damage applies at 300% effectiveness.

name: Rime Spiral
description: Releases a barrage of frost arrows that travel in a spiral. Each enemy can only be hit at most once every 0.3 seconds. The hits have a freeze rate of 70 and added spell damage applies to them at 175% effectiveness.

name: Reowyn's Frostguard
description:
Casts a shield of mystic frost which grants you a large burst of ward immediately and a smaller amount of ward every 0.4 seconds. If you run out of ward the shield breaks immediately. Otherwise it lasts 13 seconds. While the shield is up you have +100% freeze rate multiplier.

Initial ward granted: 100 + 3 per intelligence.

Ward granted every 0.4 seconds: 20 + 1 per intelligence.

When the shield expires it deals a burst of cold damage to enemies around you. This burst has a freeze rate of 100 and added spell damage applies to it at 250% effectiveness.

name: Grand Prism Nova
description: Create a massive burst of fire, cold, and lightning damage that hits all enemies around you. Added spell damage applies at 600% effectiveness.

name: Unvar's Shatter Bolt
description:
Hurls an arcane bolt that rapidly ricochets between enemies, dealing cold damage on hit and creating a small lightning explosion.

The bolt can hit the same enemy multiple times and added spell damage applies at 200% effectiveness to each hit. Its hits have a freeze rate of 80.

The lightning explosions hit the original target that caused them and enemies in a small area around them. Added spell damage applies to them at 200% effectiveness.
alttext: Increased area for area skills stats affect the explosions, but not the projectile.

name: Wave of Frost
description: An expanding wave that deals cold damage on hit with a freeze rate of 100. Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

name: Freezing Cascade
description:
Unleashes a cascade of icicles. 

Added spell damage applies at 250% to each icicle. Enemies can be hit by more than one icicle and each hit has a freeze rate of 100.
alttext: Increased area for area skills stats affect the area of the individual icicles, but not how far apart they are.

name: Elemental Tide
description:
Creates three cold explosions, then four fire explosions, and then five lightning explosions in concentric half rings in front of you.

Added spell damage applies to each explosion at 200% effectiveness and the cold explosions have a freeze rate of 80. Multiple explosions can hit the same target.
alttext: Increased area for area skills stats affect the size of the individual explosions, but not the distance between them.

name: Melee Attack
description: Added spell damage applies to the burst at 200% effectiveness and it has a freeze rate of 80.

name: Antipode
description: Create a wall that chills enemies who walk through it.

name: Antipode
description: Create a wall that chills enemies who walk through it.

name: Antipode
description: Create a wall that chills enemies who walk through it.

name: Twin Embers
description: Fires two embers in a spiral, each one deals fire damage on hit. Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness to each hit. Each target can be hit no more than once per 0.3 seconds.

name: Capsule Man Basic Projectile
description: Capsule Man Ability copied from Fireball. Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 25% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Unvar's Eruption
description: Spews fire projectiles at nearby enemies, which each deal damage in a small area on impact. Added spell damage applies at 200% effectiveness to each impact.

name: Hydra Orb
description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 25% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Aergon's Greater Fireball
description:
Hurls a burning orb that creates a massive explosion at the target location. Enemies can be hit by the orb and explosion independently.

The explosion also applies spreading flames, an ailment that deals fire damage over time and does not stack, but spreads between enemies. Spreading flames inflicted this way deals 100% more damage.
alttext: Added spell damage applies at 150% to the orb, and at 350% to the explosion.

name: Hydrahedron
alttext: Increased area for area skills stats only affect the size of the impact of individual projectiles, not the area in which the projectiles are fired.
description:
Conjures a fiery octohedron which repeatedly spews arcing fire projectiles at nearby enemies. The projectiles deal fire damage in a small area on impact.

Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness to each projectile.

name: Hydra Orb
description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 25% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Igneous Rain
description:
Pelts the target area with a barrage of small fiery meteorites that have a 50% chance to ignite enemies, and ignites inflicted this way have 20% increased duration.

Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness to each hit.
alttext: Increased area for area skills modifiers increases the size of the meteorites' impacts, but not the area in which they fall.

name: Igneous Rain
description: Call a meteor from the sky that deals a large amount of damage upon landing. Added damage is applied at 900% effectiveness.

name: Unvar's Eternal Embers
description: Fires two embers which swirl in the shape of an infinity, dealing fire damage on hit. Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness to each hit. Each target can be hit no more than once per 0.3 seconds.

name: Aergon's Mirror Bolt
description:
Conjures a fire bolt which repeatedly bounces between enemies and allies, dealing fire damage to enemies it hits, and granting ward to allies it hits. Whenever it ricochets you gain ward.

Ward gained by Allies hit: 20 + 1 per intellignece

Ward gained on Ricochet: 30 + 1.5 per intelligence.
alttext:
"Allies" includes you.

Ward gain always scales with your intelligence even when granting ward to allies.

The bolt all enemies and allies in its path, even those it does not ricochet from.

Added spell damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

name: Winds of Eos
description:
Conjures a fiery explosion, dealing fire damage to enemies it hits and granting you Frenzy and 4 stacks of Fire Aura for 4 seconds.

Frenzy is a non-stacking buff that grants 20% increased attack and cast speed. It lasts 4 seconds when gained this way.

Fire Aura deals fire damage over time in a small area around you.
alttext:
Duration increases to Frenzy and Fire Aura are applied as usual.

Added spell damage applies to the explosion at 250% effectiveness.

Added spell damage applies to each stack of Fire Aura at 140% effectiveness per second.

Increased Area for Area Skills stats can affect both the explosion and Fire Aura, but if the stat only affects Runic Invocation then it will not affect stacks of Fire Aura even if they are gained from this invocation.

name: Plasma Blast
description:
Blasts the target enemy with an arc of plasma, dealing lightning damage on hit, igniting them and applying spreading flames.

Applies 7 stacks of ignite, and ignite applied this way has 70% increased duration and +70% fire penetration.
alttext:
Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness to the lightning hit.

Neither the ignite nor the spreading flames count as spell damage.

Spreading Flames is a fire damage over time ailment that spreads between enemies and does not stack.

name: Aergon's Plasma Arc
description:
Lightning arcs between enemies around the target location, dealing ligthning damage on hit, igniting them and applying spreading flames.

Applies 7 stacks of ignite, and ignite applied this way has 70% increased duration and +70% fire penetration.
alttext:
Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness to the lightning hit.

Neither the ignite nor the spreading flames count as spell damage.

Spreading Flames is a fire damage over time ailment that spreads between enemies and does not stack.

name: Plasma Orb
description:
Conjures a fiery sphere that orbits you, dealing fire damage to enemies it hits. Lightning repeatedly arcs from the orb to nearby enemies dealing lightning damage on hit.

Added spell damage applies at 210% effectiveness to the orb's hits and at 150% to the lightning hits.

name: Lightning Arc
description: Hurl a bolt of lightning at the target
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Realms of Mayhem
description:
Conjures three glyphs in a line in front of you, which explode after a brief delay, dealing cold, lightning, and fire damage respectively.

Enemies can be hit by more than one glyph. Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness to each glyph and the cold glyph has a freeze rate of 100.

name: Antipode of the Rune Slinger
description: Conjures an antipode which repeatedly casts Rune Bolts at nearby enemies. This scales with your Rune Bolt tree.

name: Fireball
description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Has 25% chance to ignite on hit. Added spell damage applies at 125% effectiveness.
Click to select an ability

name: Crackling Glyph
description: Places a lightning glyph on the ground that explodes after a short duration. Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

internalName: Runemaster 38 Lightning Delayed Explosions Under Enemies
name: Sea of Sparks
description: Creates a series of sparks under nearby enemies that explode after a short duration. Added damage applies at 200% to each explosion and multiple explosions can hit the same target.
alttext: Increased area for area skills stats affects the size of the individual explosions, but not the area in which the sparks are created.

name: Ball Lightning
description: Creates a slow moving orb in the target direction. 4 times a second lightning arcs from the orb to up to 7 enemies around it, dealing lightning damage. Added spell damage applies at 100% effectiveness to the orb and each zap hit.

name: Il'kir's Storm Star
alttext:
Modifiers to damage over time affect the sparks, but not the initial impact.

Increased area for area skills stats affect the impact but not the sparks.
description:
Lobs a whirling projectile at the target location. It deals fire damage on impact and creates several wild sparks that move randomly and deal lightning damage over time to enemies around them.

Added spell damage applies at 400% effectiveness to the impact and at 250% effectiveness per second to each spark.

name: Spark
description: Creates several wild sparks that move randomly and deal lightning damage over time to enemies around them.
alttext: Added damage applies at 250% effectiveness per second.

name: Vilatria's Storm Lance
description:
An intense beam of lightning that hits all enemies in a line in front of you. Added damage applies at 300% effectiveness.

The beam has 100% base critical strike chance, meaning that it always crits unless the target has critical strike avoidance.

name: Dancing Sparks
description:
Creates a burst of erratic projectiles that deal lightning damage on hit and grants you ward on hit. The ward gained is equal to 10 + 1 per intelligence.

Multiple projectiles cannot hit the same target.

Added spell damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Echoes of Thunder
description: Creates a series of lightning explosions around the target location and enemies surrounding it. Added spell damage applies at 250% to each explosion and each enemy can only be hit by one explosion.

name: Echoes of Thunder
description: Creates a series of lightning explosions around the target location and enemies surrounding it. Added spell damage applies at 250% to each explosion and each enemy can only be hit by one explosion.

name: Rune Gale
description:
Releases an expanding aura that grants you haste. When the aura hits enemies it shocks them and deals lightning damage. After 1.5 seconds the aura begins to retract and after 3 seconds it detonates dealing lightning damage to enemies in a small area around you.

Added spell damage applies at 300% effectiveness to the aura hit and the detonation. Enemies can only be hit by the aura once, but can be hit by both the aura and the detonation.

name: Antipode of Mesembria
alttext: Increased area for area skills stats affect the range at which this skill damages enemies, but not the range at which it pulls enemies in.
description: Creates an antipode at the target location. After a few seconds it pulls in all enemies around it and explodes. Added spell damage applies at 900% effectiveness.

name: Grand Prism Nova
description: Create a massive burst of fire, cold, and lightning damage that hits all enemies around you. Added spell damage applies at 900% effectiveness.

name: Unvar's Shockwave
description: Creates a rapidly expanding circle that deals lightning damage on hit. Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

name: Lightning Web
description: Lightning repeatedly arcs between enemies around the target. Each enemy can be hit up to three times and added spell damage applies to each hit at 250% effectiveness.

name: Covenant Arc
description:
Lightning arcs between allies and enemies around the target location. Enemies hit take lightning damage. Allies hit gain a buff that grants +100% chance to shock on hit and +10 lightning damage for spells and attacks. This buffs last 4 seconds and can stack multiple times, but each target can only be hit once per second.

Allies hit also gain Frenzy for 4 seconds. Frenzy is a buff that grants 20% increased attack and cast speed, and does not stack.

The lightning can arc to you and buff you, but only if you're close enough to the target location or to another target to which it has already arced.
alttext: Added spell damage is applied at 150% effectiveness to the lightning hit against enemies.

name: Trinity of Elements
description: Creates three elemental beams that rotate around you. Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness per second for each beam and the cold beam has 100 freeze rate per second.

name: Tri-Beam Cold
description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

name: Tri-Beam Cold
description: Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

name: CapsuleMan Explosion With Delayer
description: Create a burst of fire damage around a minion. Has 400% added damage effectiveness.
