Runic Burst
description: A sudden burst of fire damage in a small area around the target
alttext: Added spell damage applies at 100% effectiveness

name: Flurry Swipes
description:
The companion ability of your Primal Sabertooth.

Releases three swipes in rapid succession
alttext: Scales with your sabertooth's stats rather than yours

name: Sacrifice
description: Rips apart an allied minion, dealing physical damage to enemies around it.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

name: Venom Nova
description:
The companion ability of your Primal Scorpion.

Releases a burst of venom that inflicts all enemies around the scorpion with 3 stacks of poison, and releases a spiral of projectiles that also inflict poison on hit.
alttext: Scales with your scorpion's stats rather than yours.

name: Evade
description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

name: Serpent Strike
description:
Requires a spear.

A melee attack with 140% poison chance.

Poisons inflicted by serpent strike last 40% longer.
alttext:
Poison chance above 100% gives a chance to apply additional stacks of poison (this mechanic applies to all hits, not just Serpent Strike).

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Shade Eruption
description: An explosion that deals fire damage in an area.
alttext: Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Shadow Cascade
description:
Requires dual wielding.

A circular attack that's also used by your shadow clones.
alttext: Added damages is applied at 200% effectiveness. Base critical strike chance is 10%, instead of the normal 5%.

name: Shadow Daggers
description: Upon reaching 4 stacks of Shadow Daggers, the Daggers plunge into the target, dealing physical damage. This damage always critically strikes.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 340% effectiveness.

name: Shatter Strike
alttext:
Has a freeze rate of 50.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.
description:
A sweeping melee attack of 2 arcs that strikes enemies in a circle around you dealing cold damage and instantly kills frozen enemies below 10% health.

Enemies in the middle of the attack are hit twice, where the arcs overlap.

name: Shield Bash
description:
Requires a shield.

A melee directional attack that stuns enemies for 1 second. 100% increased stun duration against non-boss enemies.

1.5% more damage per 1% block chance (up to 150%, multiplicative with other modifiers).

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun an enemy, including with Shield Bash itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.
alttext:
Increased attack speed has no effect for Shield Bash.

Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

name: Shield Rush
description:
Requires a shield.

Charge through enemies in the target direction until you release the ability key. You hit enemies in your path and in a wider area at the end of the movement. You do not regenerate mana while rushing.
alttext:
Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

name: Shield Shatter
description: Launch shield fragments in a cone in front of you.

name: Shield Throw
alttext:
The shield hits all enemies in its path, even those it does not ricochet from.

Added throwing attack damage is applied at 225% effectiveness.
description:
Throws a shield at a target enemy. The shield ricochets to up to 2 additional targets before returning to you.

You cannot throw a new shield until the current shield has returned to you.

alttext:
The shield hits all enemies in its path, even those it does not ricochet from.

Added throwing attack damage is applied at 200% effectiveness.
name: Shield Throw
description:
Throws a shield at a target enemy. The shield ricochets to up to 2 additional targets before returning to you.

The cooldown starts when the shield returns to you.

name: Shift
description: Dash a short fixed distance in the target direction.
alttext: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

name: Shrapnel
description: Fires a piece of burning shrapnel in a random direction.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 80% effectiveness.

name: Shurikens
description: Throw 3 shurikens in a cone.
alttext: Added damage applies at 125% effectiveness.

name: Symbols of Hope
description:
Every 2 seconds, summons a symbol that orbits you, causing you and your allies' attacks and spells to deal 3 additional fire damage and increasing health regeneration by 20%.

Activate to consume the symbols, granting 100 ward and 5% less damage taken per symbol for 3 seconds.

You can have up to 3 symbols at a time.

name: Ice Spiral
description: Releases a barrage of frost arrows that travel in a spiral. Each enemy can only be hit at most once every 0.3 seconds. The hits have a freeze rate of 70 and added spell damage applies to them at 175% effectiveness.
Cast a razor sharp shard of ice at the target direction. Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness.
name: Ice Shard

description: Cast a ball of fire towards the target. Added spell damage applies at 175% effectiveness.
name: Fireball
Acid Flask
description: Throw a flask of acid that explodes on impact, poisoning enemies and reducing their armor.
alttext: Added throwing damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

name: Explosive Ground
description: Creates a patch of explosive ground that detonates after 3 seconds.

name: Spark Nova
description: Deals lightning damage around the target area.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Smelter's Wrath
description:
Channel to charge a powerful frontal cone attack, dealing fire and physical damage to all enemies hit. Charging for longer increases its range and power. 2 second maximum charge time.

Your armor is doubled while channelling Smelter's Wrath.
alttext:
Deals up to 100% more damage at maximum charge.

Added damage is applied at 600% effectiveness.

Increased Area for Area Skills stats increase Smelter's Wrath's charge speed instead of its area.

name: Smite
description:
Smites a target enemy with a bolt of holy fire that descends from the sky, healing allies around the target for 60 health. If you are in the area you are also healed.

Cannot be used without a target.
alttext: Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A bolt of lightning directly strikes the target.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Drop a Smoke Bomb at your feet that blinds enemies and grants you haste while you remain inside it. The Smoke Bomb grows in size over its duration. Lasts 4 seconds.
alttext: You can have a maximum of 2 smoke bombs active at once.

name: Snap Freeze
description:
Freezes enemies in a cone in front of you. Freeze lasts for 2 seconds.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you freeze an enemy, including with Snap Freeze itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

name: Soul Eruption
description: Creates 5 souls that target enemies and apply Marked for Death. Also applies Marked for Death to you.

name: Soulfire Shield
description: Toggles between fire immunity and necrotic immunity at the cost of one soul ember.
lore: <#C686FF>Soulfire Shield</color> ability gained while inside the Soulfire Basition

name: Spark Charge
description: Spark charges explode after 1 second dealing lightning damage to nearby enemies. Spark charges automatically detonate when the enemy they are attached to dies.

name: Spirit Plague
description: Curses a target with a powerful necrotic damage over time effect which lasts 3 seconds. Spreads to a single nearby target on target death.
alttext: Added spell damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.

name: Spirit Thorns
description: Releases a burst of thorns towards enemies in the target direction. Thorns deal physical damage on hit and multiple thorns can hit the same target.
alttext: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

name: Spirit Wolves
description:
Your summoned wolves release spirit wolves that travel through enemies in a line, dealing melee physical damage.

Each spirit wolf scales with the stats of the wolf that released it.
alttext: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

name: Rejuvenating Wind
description:
The companion ability of your Spriggan.

Restores 150 health and 15 mana to the spriggan and all nearby allies over 2 seconds.
alttext: Scales with your spriggan's stats and your minion stats. The amount healed scales with your spriggan's increased healing effectiveness.

name: Spriggan Form
description:
Transform into a forest spriggan, increasing your spell casting capabilities, and gaining 4 new abilities.

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in spriggan form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
alttext:
The four new abilities are: Spirit Thorns, Thorn Shield, Summon Vine and Summon Healing Totem.

While in spriggan form you have 50% increased spell damage and +300 armor.

name: Evade
description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

name: Summon Vines
description:
Summons 3 poisonous vines around the target location.

Vines are melee minions that inflict poison on hit. You can have up to 12 vines.

name: Sciurine Rage
description:
The companion ability of your Primal Squirrels.

Your squirrels are worked up into a Sciurine Rage and gain 40% increased movement and attack speed for 4 seconds.

name: Static
description:
Static charges up as you move or when you get hit. Activate Static to discharge what you have built up, striking up to 5 nearby enemies with lightning.

100 charges maximum. Deals 4% more damage per charge.
alttext:
By default static gains 5 charges per second while moving, and also gains 5 charges whenever you take a hit.

Added spell damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

name: Static Orb
description: Casts an orb in a target direction that deals lightning damage and pulls enemies that it hits towards it as it travels. At the target location it explodes, dealing lightning damage to enemies surrounding it and also striking up to 5 enemies further out. The further it travels the higher the damage and area of effect of the explosion, up to 100%.
alttext:
As the area of effect of the explosion increases so does the maximum range at which it can strike additional enemies. Increased Area for Area Skills stats also affect both and are additive with this increase.

Static Orb's added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness and the explosion added damages is applied at 200% effectiveness.

name: Void Beam
description: A void beam that deals spell damage over time.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 300% effectiveness each second.

name: Crowstorm
alttext:
Your crows' added spell damage applies at 400% effectiveness by default.

Not affected by increased cast speed.
description:
The companion ability of your Storm Crows.

Your crows call down a single massive lightning strike on the targeted area after a brief delay, hitting all enemies in the area. Deals 30% more damage per contributing crow.

name: Storm Orb
description: Create an orb that explodes after one second, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 50% effectiveness.

name: Summon Anurok
description:
Summons Anuroks to fill your unused companion slots.

Anuroks are not affected by increased area of effect stats, but gain 3% more damage for each 1% increased Area of Effect for Minion Area Skills.

rex minion_alttext: Press A to give your minions an attack command.
rex minion_description:
Summons a Tyrannosaur minion that follows you into combat. It can roar, granting your other minions +25 physical damage with spells and attacks, and the bonuses from Tyrant's Skull are applied to them at 20% effectiveness. The roar's buff lasts for 12 seconds, and also grants frenzy to all allies hit for the same duration.

The roar also applies frailty, slow, and armor shred to nearby enemies.

name: Summon Ancestral Sabertooth
description: Creates an ancestral spirit sabertooth which will attack your enemies for 4 seconds before dissipating. Ancestral sabertooths have the same stats as your sabertooth, but can't use abilities other than basic attack.

name: Summon Historic Minion
description:
Tolmat's History of Eterra describes many fantastical creatures from across the eras of Eterra, and how to tame them.

One such creature is summoned to aid you whenever you travel to a new area, and if it perishes a new one will be summoned in its stead.
alttext: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

name: Summon Arek's Flesh
description: Summon the remains of Arek to fight for you. Arek uses physical melee attacks.
alttext: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

name: Summon Baby Scorpion
description: Summons baby scorpions which will follow your scorpion around and attack enemies. Baby scorpions receive the same stats as your scorpion.
alttext: The scorpion has 400 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks. Press A to give your minions an attack command.

name: Ballista
description: Summons a ballista that fires bolts at nearby enemies.
alttext: Ballistae have 1000 base health and last 10 seconds by default. Enemies rarely target ballistas.

name: Summon Bear
description:
Summons a primal bear that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The bear counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
alttext: Primals bears have 300 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Blood Specter
description: Summons a specter that rapidly fades from this world, but will seek and attack your foes while it remains.

name: Summon Bone Golem
description: Summons a bone golem, which attacks slowly, but has a 15% chance to retaliate with Bone Shatter when hit.
alttext: Bone golems have 400 base health.

name: Summon Skeleton
description: Summon a Bone Minion to attack your enemies for 20 seconds.

name: Summon Bone Prison
description:
Summons a bone prison around a target area.

The {Bone Prison} is considered a minion and is made up of several small sections, each with 300 base health.

name: Summon Claw Totem
description:
Summons a totem that attacks with Swipe. It only scales with totem and minion stats, but it is affected by your Swipe Tree.

Claw Totems have 120 base health and last for 12 seconds.

name: Corpse Parasite
description: Summon a corpse parasite that will attack nearby enemies for 4 seconds, dealing melee physical damage.
alttext: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

name: Summon Crab
alttext: The crab has 400 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.
description:
Summons a loyal crab that follows you into combat.

Effects that trigger when you use Evade also trigger when you use Summon Crab.

name: Summon Falcon
description: Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. Resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Frenzy Totem
description: Summons a totem that grants Frenzy to all nearby allies. Frenzy increases attack and cast speed by 20%.
alttext: Frenzy totems have 120 base health and last 6 seconds.

name: Summon Healing Totem
description: Summons a totem that repeatedly heals nearby allies for 100 health. Healing totems have 100 base health and last 6 seconds.

name: Summon Illusory Tree
description: Summons an illusory tree that distracts your opponents and lasts 8 seconds.

name: Summon Skeletal Mage
description:
Summons a Skeletal Mage to assist you. You are limited to 2 Skeletal Mages at a time.
Skeletal Mages cast Dread Bolt, which has 150% added damage effectiveness and has a 50% chance to apply Damned on hit.
alttext:
Skeletal Mages have 100 base health.

You will always summon the Skeletal Mage type you have the fewest of.

name: Recruit Mercenary
description: Recruit a crossbow mercenary to guard you.
alttext: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

name: Summon Mirror Image
description: Summon a mirror image to distract your foes.

name: Summon Soul Wisp
description: Summons a wisp which lasts 10 seconds.

name: Summon Raptor
description:
Summons a primal raptor that ferociously attacks your enemies. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The raptor counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
alttext: The raptor has 240 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Revenant
description: Summons a revenant that rapidly fades from this world, but will seek and attack your foes while it remains.

name: Summon Coldstone Elemental
description: Summon a coldstone elemental with decaying health to attack your enemies.

name: Summon Sabertooth
description:
Summons a primal sabertooth cat that leaps into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The sabertooth cat counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
alttext: The sabertooth has 240 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Scorpion
description:
Summons a scorpion that follows you into combat. Its attacks with its tails inflict a long lasting poison. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The scorpion counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
alttext: The scorpion has 400 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Primal Serpent
description:
Summon a Primal Serpent, a melee minion that poisons on hit. They have an unlimited duration, but do not regenerate health.

You are limited to one primal serpent at a time, but Primal Serpents do not count towards your companion limit.

Primal Serpents have 500 base health.

name: Summon Skeleton
description: Summons a skeleton warrior or skeleton archer to guard you. You are limited to 3 skeletons at a time.
alttext:
Skeletons have 100 base health.

You will always summon the skeleton type you have the fewest of.

Increased Area for Minion Area Skills stats affect summoned skeletons' melee attacks.

name: Summon Skeleton Harvester
description: Summon an ancient skeleton to harvest your foes.

name: Summon Skeleton Vanguard
description: Summon a Skeleton Vanguard wielding a spear which fights for you.

name: Summon Spriggan
alttext: The spriggan has 160 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.
description:
Summon a spriggan that casts spells to attack your enemies and has a passive Healing Aura that restores 10 health per second. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The spriggan counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.

name: Summon Storm Crows
description:
Summons Storm Crows up to your companion limit. The Storm Crow casts spells from a distance. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

The Storm Crow counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
alttext: The crow has 200 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Storm Sprite
description: Summons a storm sprite to defend your totem. Storm Sprites use lightning spells to damage nearby enemies and last for 6 seconds.

name: Summon Storm Totem
description:
Summons a totem that casts lightning storms around nearby enemies.

Storm totems last 8 seconds, and you cannot control more than 1 at once.
alttext: Storm totems have 120 base health

name: Summon Tempest Totem
description: Summons a totem that repeatedly casts a {Tempest}.
alttext: Tempest totems have 100 base health and last 8 seconds.

description: Summons a totem that fires thorns at nearby enemies. You can have a maximum of two thorn totems by default.
alttext:
Totems scale with your minion or totem stats, not your stats.
Added minion spell damage applies at 75% effectiveness for the Thorns fired by the Thorn Totem.

Thorn totems have 120 base health and last 6 seconds by default.
name: Summon Thorn Totem
Summon Upheaval Totem
description: Summons a totem that repeatedly attacks with Upheaval.
alttext: Upheaval totems have 100 base health and lasts 8 seconds.

name: Vale Spirit
description: Creates a Vale Spirit which orbits you for a short time. During this time you automatically shoot nearby enemies with Spirit Thorns from the Vale Spirit.
alttext: The Spirit Thorns cast through Vale Spirit use your stats.

name: Summon Vine
description:
Summons 1 poisonous vine.

Vines are melee minions that inflict poison on hit. You can have up to 12 vines.

name: Summon Vines
description:
Summon 3 poisonous vines for 8 seconds.

Each vine has 50 base health.

name: Summon Volatile Zombie
description: Summons a Volatile Zombie which trudges towards the nearest enemy. When it reaches an enemy or dies, it explodes dealing physical and fire damage to surrounding enemies.
alttext:
You are limited to 6 active zombies. Summoning more will cause older ones to explode.

Volatile Zombies' have 200 base health and their health decays at an accelerating rate.

name: Summon Warcry Totem
description: Summons a totem that repeatedly grants casts Warcry.
alttext: Warcry totems have 100 base health and last 3 seconds.

name: Summon Forged Weapon
description:
Summons a Forged Weapon which lasts for 20 seconds and is affected by the stats and attack rate of your weapon. You can control up to 6 Forged Weapons at once.

Forged Weapons have 220 based health.
alttext: Press A to give your minions an attack command.

name: Summon Wolf
description:
Summons a primal wolf that follows you into combat. When its health drops to 0 it is downed, and you can stand near it to revive it.

While you have your maximum number of wolves, the ability is replaced with {Howl}.

The wolf counts as a companion. You can have a maximum of two companions at once by default.
alttext: The Wolf has 220 base health and is resistant to powerful area attacks.

name: Summon Wraith
description: Summons a wraith that rapidly fades from this world, but will seek and attack your foes while it remains.
alttext:
You are limited to 6 active wraiths.

Wraiths have 60 base health.

name: Sundering Thorns
description: Launch a barrage of thorns in a line.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 60% effectiveness.

name: Surge
description: Quick fixed distance dash which hits all enemies in the path with a lightning melee attack.
alttext:
Added melee damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

name: Spirit Step
description:
Swap places with a target wandering spirit at the targeted area. If there is no spirit, you will instead reappear a short distance forwards.

Effects that trigger when you use Evade also trigger when you use Spirit Step.

name: Swarm of Bees
description: Summon a swarm of bees to attack your enemies.

name: Evade
description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

name: Swarmblade Form
description:
Transform into an agile Swarmblade, increasing your melee capabilities, and gaining 4 new abilities.

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in swarmblade form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
alttext:
The four new abilities are: Armblade Slashes, Swarm Strike, Dash and Summon Hive.

While in Swarmblade Form you have 10% increased melee attack speed and movement speed.

name: Armblade Slash
description: Slash enemies in front of you with a fast combo ability.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

name: Armblade Slash
description: Slash enemies in front of you with a fast combo ability.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

name: Dive
description: Dash a short fixed distance in the target direction dealing damage to all enemies in your path.
alttext:
Dive's cooldown does not recover while you are using it.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness

name: Swarm Strike
description: A circular attack which deals damage to all nearby enemies, then gathers nearby locusts to create a Swarm around you which deals damage over time to nearby enemies.
alttext:
For each Locust consumed the Swarm gains +15 melee physical, +15 melee poison damage, 15% increased duration, and 15% increased area.

Added melee damage applies at 350% effectiveness to the initial hit and at 300% per second to the Swarm.

name: Summon Hive
description:
Summons a Hive that releases Locusts while enemies are nearby. You can have a maximum of three Hives by default and each Hive contains 12 Locusts.

You are limited to 12 active Locusts and each Locust lasts up to 12 seconds.
alttext: The rate at which it summons Locusts scales with minion cast speed. Locusts scale with your minion stats.

name: Human Form
description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

name: Swipe
description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Unaffected by weapon range.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Synchronized Strike
description:
Requires a melee weapon.

Jump forward and strike in an area in front of you while shadows appear and simultaneously strike on either side of you.

name: Tail Slam
description:
A melee physical hit followed by a powerful cascading explosion. The explosion counts as a fire spell and applies ignite on hit.

Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness to the melee hit and 200% effectiveness to the explosion.

Increased Area for Minion Area Skills applies to the melee hit, but not the cascading explosion.

name: Teleport
description: Teleport to target location.
alttext: Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.

name: Frigid Tempest
description: Conjures a spear of frost that pierces enemies.
alttext: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.

name: Wind Tempest
alttext: Added damage applies to the damage over time at 150% effectiveness per second.
description: Conjures a whirlwind that moves a short distance forwards, dealing damage over time to enemies in its path.

name: Tempest Strike
description:
A melee combo attack that cycles through a cold strike, a physical strike, and a lightning strike that trigger elemental {Tempest} spells of the same damage type if the strikes hit at least one enemy.

Cold strike: Triggers a {Frigid Tempest}, which is a cold projectile that pierces through enemies.
Physical strike: Triggers a {Wind Tempest}, which is a small twister that lasts a short duration dealing physical damage per over time.
Lightning strike: Triggers a {Thunder Tempest}, which is an expanding storm of lightning bolts.
alttext:
Added damage for the melee strikes apply at 100% effectiveness.

{Frigid Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.
{Wind Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.
{Thunder Tempest}: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Thunder Tempest
description: Conjures a wave of lightning that damages all enemies around you.
alttext: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Tempest Strike
description:
A melee combo attack that cycles through a cold strike, a physical strike, and a lightning strike that trigger elemental {Tempest} spells of the same damage type if the strikes hit at least one enemy.

Cold strike: Triggers a {Frigid Tempest}, which is a cold projectile that pierces through enemies.
Physical strike: Triggers a {Wind Tempest}, which is a small twister that lasts a short duration dealing physical damage per over time.
Lightning strike: Triggers a {Thunder Tempest}, which is an expanding storm of lightning bolts.
alttext:
Added damage for the melee strikes apply at 100% effectiveness.

{Frigid Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.
{Wind Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.
{Thunder Tempest}: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Tempest Strike
description:
A melee combo attack that cycles through a cold strike, a physical strike, and a lightning strike that trigger elemental {Tempest} spells of the same damage type if the strikes hit at least one enemy.

Cold strike: Triggers a {Frigid Tempest}, which is a cold projectile that pierces through enemies.
Physical strike: Triggers a {Wind Tempest}, which is a small twister that lasts a short duration dealing physical damage per over time.
Lightning strike: Triggers a {Thunder Tempest}, which is an expanding storm of lightning bolts.
alttext:
Added damage for the melee strikes apply at 100% effectiveness.

{Frigid Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness.
{Wind Tempest}: Added damage applies at 150% effectiveness per second.
{Thunder Tempest}: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Thorn Shield Burst
description: Releases a burst of thorns, damaging all nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Thorn Shield
description: Form a protective barrier of thorns around yourself or an ally that grants 30 armor and reflects 50 damage to attackers. When the shield expires, a burst of thorns shoots out and damages all nearby enemies.

name: Thorn Volley
description: Releases a burst of thorns towards enemies in the target direction. Thorns deal physical damage on hit and multiple thorns can hit the same target.
alttext: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

name: Tidal Wave
description: A wave of crashing water dealing spell cold damage and chilling enemies in a wide area.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

name: Time Bubble
description: Creates a bubble where time moves slower than the space around it. Slows enemies caught in the time bubble and shreds their void resistance.

name: Temporal Rift
description: Travel between the Divine and Imperial eras without moving, dragging nearby enemies along with you.
lore: <#C686FF>Temporal Rift</color> ability gained while inside the Oerden's Watch Woven Echo.

name: Temporal Shift
description: Travel between the Divine and Ruined eras without moving
lore: <#C686FF>Temporal Shift</color> ability gained while inside Julra's Sanctum.
alttext: Dodge the timeline collapse using <#C686FF>Temporal Shift.

name: Time Wave
description: Release a torrent of time distortion around you, damaging nearby enemies.
alttext: Added damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

name: Tornado
description: Conjures a tornado that moves at random, pulling in nearby enemies and dealing physical damage to them.
alttext: Added damage applies to the damage over time at 125% effectiveness per second.

name: Poison Burst
description: Deals a small amount of physical damage and has 100% chance to poison on hit.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Shatter Totem
alttext: Upheaval Totems cannot be shattered.
description:
Shatters the totem, destroying it to deal physical damage to all nearby enemies and restore 2 health per attunement to you.
Has 400% added damage effectiveness.

name: Transplant
alttext:
Added damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.

Using a Traversal skill puts all other traversal skills on cooldown and traversal skills' cooldowns do not recover while you are using a traversal skill.
description:
Creates a new body for you at the target location, then detonates your old body to deal physical damage to enemies around it.

Instead of mana, this spell costs 13% of your current health.

name: Tsunami
alttext:
If cast by Maelstrom, the total damage is multiplied by the number of Maelstrom stacks you reached.

Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.
description: Creates a frigid cascading Tsunami around you that deals cold damage in an area.

name: Tundra Nova
description: Cast a burst of frigid sleet to pelt enemies around the target.
alttext: Tundra Nova has a freeze rate of 80.

name: Twisters
description: Conjures 2 to 4 twisters that move at random, dealing physical damage to enemies they pass through each second.
alttext: Added damage applies to the damage over time at 75% effectiveness per second.

description:
A combo ability that throws 2 blades, then 4 blades, then recalls all blades in the ground back to you, hitting enemies along the way.

An enemy can be hit by multiple blades from the same throw and by multiple blades from the recall.

Shadows using Umbral Blades always throw a single Shadow Blade that deals 300% more damage and has 100% increased radius.

Only the first part of the combo costs mana.
alttext:
Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

Umbral Blades can persist in the ground for up to 6 seconds.
name: Umbral Blades

description: Throws 4 Umbral Blades.
name: Umbral Blades
alttext: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

description: Recall all Umbral Blades to you, hitting enemies along the way.
name: Umbral Blades
alttext: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

name: Blade Explosion
description: Umbral Blades left in the ground explode after a short delay or upon contact with an enemy.
alttext: Added damage applies at 60% effectiveness. 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit.

name: Upheaval
description: Sunders the ground in a line in front of you, dealing damage to enemies along the path.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 150% effectiveness.

name: Shatter
description: Shatters the frozen enemy, dealing cold damage to enemies around it.

name: Shockwave
description: Unleashes a shockwave around the enemy or totem, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Cannot hit enemies that were already hit by the Upheaval.
alttext:
Upheaval and its Shockwaves deal the same amount of damage.

Added damage is applied at 135% effectiveness.

name: Vengeance
description:
A melee attack that also prepares you to riposte incoming hits.

If vengeance successfully hits an enemy and you take a hit in the next 2 seconds you will riposte, taking 25% less damage and striking at a nearby enemy.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 125% effectiveness to the initial hit and 150% effectiveness to the riposte.

name: Shocking Impact
description: Call a meteor from the sky that deals a large amount of damage upon landing. Added damage is applied at five times its normal value.

name: Shocking Impact
description: Call a meteor from the sky that deals a large amount of damage upon landing. Added damage is applied at five times its normal value.

name: Void Aegis
description: If you take a hit that deals at least 25% of your max health as damage, sacrifice a void essence to gain Void Aegis for 4 seconds, which grants a portion of your maximum health gained as endurance threshold.

name: Void Cleave
description:
Requires a 2-handed sword or axe.

A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Can be echoed by Void Knights. Unaffected by weapon range.
alttext: Added damage applies at 400% effectiveness.

name: Void Eruption
description: An orb of pure void energy, seeking out your enemies and destroying them.

name: Void Rift
description:
Creates a dark rift in an area, dealing void damage to enemies it hits.

Added spell damage applies at 100% effectiveness.

name: Voidwinter Bolt
description: Cast 3 piercing corrupted shards of ice towards enemies in front of you.
alttext: Added spell damage is applied at 600% effectiveness to each shard.

name: Void Bolt
description: Launches a bolt of piercing void energy at a nearby enemy.
alttext: Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Volatile Reversal
description: A combo ability that jumps forwards in time to a target location and performs a melee attack on arrival. Recast within 3 seconds to jump backwards in time to your original location and perform a melee attack on arrival.
alttext:
Added damage applies to the melee attacks at 200% effectiveness.

Volatile Reversal's cooldown continues recovering while the recast is available.

name: Volatile Reversal
description: A combo ability that jumps forwards in time to a target location and performs a melee attack on arrival. Recast within 3 seconds to jump backwards in time to your original location and perform a melee attack on arrival.
alttext: Added damage applies to the melee attacks at 200% effectiveness.

name: Volcanic Orb
description: Casts a fiery orb that spews burning shrapnel in all directions.
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.

name: Wandering Spirits
description:
Reveals wandering spirits around you for 6 seconds. The spirits wander at random dealing necrotic damage over time to enemies they pass through.

4 spirits are revealed immediately after casting the skill and 17 more are revealed over the next 6 seconds.

The spirits individually last up to 4 seconds, but all remaining spirits fade once the reveal duration ends.
alttext:
Added spell damage applies to each spirit's damage at 200% effectiveness per second.

Increased Area stats affect the area of effect of each individual spirit, but not the area in which spirits are revealed.

name: Warcry
description:
Unleash a mighty roar that knocks back nearby enemies and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Rares and bosses are stunned for half as long.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun (or freeze if Warcry is converted to cold) an enemy, including with Warcry itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

name: Chaos Bolts
description: A barrage of chaotic projectiles which land in an area around the target. The explosions deal necrotic and fire damage in a small area.
alttext: Added damage applies at 100% effectiveness for each bolt.

name: Ghostflame
alttext: Added damage applies at 600% effectiveness each second. Damage reduces while rotating.
description: Channel to releases a continuous jet of horrid flames in front of you dealing fire and necrotic damage over time.

name: Soul Feast
alttext: Added spell damage is applied at 250% effectiveness.
description:
Feasts on the souls of {Cursed} enemies, dealing necrotic damage to them, and drawing fragments of their souls back to you. The soul fragments each grant 3 ward when they reach you.

Feasts on up to 13 enemies, prioritising those closest to you.

name: Chthonic Fissure
description:
Opens an infernal fissure in the ground, dealing fire damage over time to enemies on top of it, as well as releasing {Spirits} from the fissure that seek nearby enemies. These spirits inflict enemies with {Torment}, a {Curse} that slows and deals necrotic damage over time.

Max 1 active fissure.
alttext:
Added damage for the {Fissure} applies at 120% effectiveness each second.

Added damage for the {Spirits} applies at 30% effectiveness.

{Torment} applies 18% less movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), deals 120 damage over 3 seconds and added damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.

name: Tormenting Spirit
description: Tormenting Spirits hits enemies and inflicts them with {Torment}, dealing necrotic damage over time.
alttext:
Added damage for the {Spirits} applies at 30% effectiveness.

{Torment} applies 18% less movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), deals 120 damage over 3 seconds and added damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.

name: Profane Veil
alttext:
You have 40% less movement speed while channeling (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Added spell damage applies at 200% effectiveness per second.
description:
Channel to conceal yourself within a Profane Veil that deals necrotic damage over time to enemies around you. While concealed you dodge every Hit, but you can still take damage from damage over time effects, such as ailments, and you move more slowly.

Last for up to 2 seconds (also ends when you release the key). Cooldown does not recover during use.

name: Stygian Beam
alttext: Added damage is applied at 100% effectiveness.
description: Shoot a quick necrotic beam at the target.

name: Warpath
description: Spin towards the mouse while you hold down the ability key, striking nearby enemies as you move.
alttext:
You have 20% less movement speed while spinning (multiplicative with other modifiers). Hits at twice your attack rate, but added damage applies at 60% effectiveness and there is a 40% less chance to apply ailments on hit. 

You cannot be stunned while spinning.

Not affected by weapon range.

name: Water Orb
description:
Cast a frigid orb of water to blast your enemy.
Added spell damage is applied at 400% effectiveness.

name: Evade
description:
Rapidly move a short distance forwards.

Evading does not grant damage immunity or prevent abilities from hitting you.

Evade gains 0.5% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed per Character level.

name: Maul
description: Jump forward a short distance and slam into the ground dealing damage to nearby enemies.
alttext: Added melee damage applies at 250% effectiveness.

name: Rampage
description: Charge towards a target location dealing damage and knocking back enemies in your path.
alttext: Rampage's cooldown does not recover while you are using it.

name: Werebear Form
description:
Transform into a ferocious werebear, increasing your physical capabilities and gaining 4 new abilities. 

Your mana is replaced with Rage while in werebear form. When your Rage reaches 0 you automatically transform back into your human form. Your starting Rage is equal to your maximum mana. Rage slowly decays over time at a constant rate.
alttext:
The four new abilities are: Rampage, Swipe, Maul and Roar. Swipe and Roar inherit all bonuses from your Swipe and Warcry skill trees.

While in bear form you have 50% increased melee damage and 15% increased health.

name: Roar
description:
Unleash a thunderous roar which knocks enemies back and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Rares and bosses are stunned for half as long.. All effects from your Warcry Skill Tree are applied to Roar.

20% of remaining cooldown recovered whenever you stun (or freeze if Warcry is converted to cold) an enemy, including with Roar itself. This effect can occur a maximum of two times each second.

name: Swipe
description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Unaffected by weapon range. Your Swipe Skill Tree applies to this ability.

name: Swipe
description: A melee attack that hits all enemies in an area in front of you. Unaffected by weapon range.

name: Human Form
description: Return back to human form, returning your original stats and abilities.

name: Howl
alttext:
"Allies" includes you and your other minions.

Frenzy grants 20% increased attack and cast speed.

This buff does not stack, even if you have multiple wolves.

Scales with your wolves' Increased Area for Area Skills stat.
description:
The companion ability of your Primal Wolves.

Your wolves howl to embolden themselves and allies around them, granting them frenzy and 25% more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 3 seconds.

The howl also heals allies around you for 50 health.

name: Ice Bite
description:
Bites the enemy with icy fangs, dealing melee cold damage. 
Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness.

name: Necrotic Beams
description: Shoots beams of dark energy at up to 3 targets. The beams deal necrotic damage on hit, and the Wraithlord's added spell damage is applied at 200% effectiveness to each hit.

name: Vomit
description: Vomits to death over 3 seconds, dealing a mixture of physical and poison damage over time to nearby enemies.

name: Soul Reave
description: A necrotic melee attack that hits all enemies in a wide area. This attack has 15% more radius compared to the abomination's basic melee attack.
alttext: Added damage applies at 200% effectiveness.
